title: Kennisgewing: TDR38/2023/2024: Opgradering van Vleiweg, Voorbaai
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BESIGHEIDSNUUS - Die Mosselbaai Munisipaliteit het Nako Iliso Raadgewende Ingenieurs (Konsultant) en Urhwebo e-Transand (Kontrakteur) aangestel vir die Opgradering van Vleiweg, Voorbaai.","html":"BESIGHEIDSNUUS - Die Mosselbaai Munisipaliteit het Nako Iliso Raadgewende Ingenieurs (Konsultant) en Urhwebo e-Transand (Kontrakteur) aangestel vir die Opgradering van Vleiweg, Voorbaai."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Neem asseblief kennis  at Vleiweg (tussen Nestlé en Terblanche Vervoer) gesluit sal wees vir alle verkeer vanaf Saterdag, 19 Julie 2025 tot en met Vrydag, 25 Julie 2025 weens padwerke wat uitgevoer word."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ons vra omverskoning vir enige ongerief en waardeer u samewerking gedurende hierdie tydperk.","html":"Ons vra omverskoning vir enige ongerief en waardeer u samewerking gedurende hierdie tydperk."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vir enige verdere navrae is u welkom om die volgende persoon by Urhwebo e-Transand (Kontrakteur)  te kontak:","html":"Vir enige verdere navrae is u welkom om die volgende persoon by Urhwebo e-Transand (Kontrakteur) te kontak:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chris Bezuidenhout (Sel: 082 710 0477).","html":"Chris Bezuidenhout (Sel: 082 710 0477)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Die Uwe","html":"Die Uwe"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Urhwebo e-Transand","html":"Urhwebo e-Transand"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"NOTICE: TDR38/2023/2024: UPGRADE VLEI ROAD, VOORBAAI:","html":"NOTICE: TDR38/2023/2024: UPGRADE VLEI ROAD, VOORBAAI:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"TEMPORARY ROAD CLOSURE","html":"TEMPORARY ROAD CLOSURE"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Municipality has appointed Nako Iliso Consulting Engineers (Consultant) and Urhwebo e-Transand (Contractor) for the Upgrading of Vlei Road, Voorbaai","html":"The Mossel Bay Municipality has appointed Nako Iliso Consulting Engineers (Consultant) and Urhwebo e-Transand (Contractor) for the Upgrading of Vlei Road, Voorbaai"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please note that due to road works, Vlei Road (between Nestlé and Terblanche Transport) will be closed to all traffic from Saturday, 19 July 2025, until Friday, 25 July 2025.","html":"Please note that due to road works, Vlei Road (between Nestlé and Terblanche Transport) will be closed to all traffic from Saturday, 19 July 2025, until Friday, 25 July 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your cooperation during this period.","html":"We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your cooperation during this period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For any further enquiries, you are welcome to contact the following person at Urhwebo","html":"For any further enquiries, you are welcome to contact the following person at Urhwebo"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"e-Transand (Contractor):","html":"e-Transand (Contractor):"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chris Bezuidenhout (Cell: 082 710 0477)","html":"Chris Bezuidenhout (Cell: 082 710 0477)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Yours faithfully","html":"Yours faithfully"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Urhwebo e-Transand","html":"Urhwebo e-Transand"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
